Journal Article · Journal of Environmental Chemical Engineering, 11, 111563

MoS2/Au Heterojunction Nanostructures for Electrochemical Detection of Trace Hg(II) in Wastewater Samples

Yuhui Liu, Jiayin Zhao, Ke Zhao, Shuang Zhang, Rongteng Tian, Mengyu Chang, Yingcai Wang, Xiaoyan Li, Liya Ge, and Grzegorz Lisak

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

MoS2/Au heterojunction nanostructures for electrochemical detection of trace Hg(II) in wastewater samples.

Highlights

  • Applies heterojunction nanostructures to environmental electrochemical sensing.
  • Targets trace Hg(II) detection in wastewater samples.

Add sensing performance and wastewater-sample validation details here.

Citation

Yuhui Liu et al. MoS2/Au Heterojunction Nanostructures for Electrochemical Detection of Trace Hg(II). J. Environ. Chem. Eng. 2023, 11, 111563.
